User caught a reusable mechanism (changed-line premerge gate) scoped repo-local in a harness repo with no host-local-vs-skill-capability classification; lesson recorded, recurrence-preventing tripwire is a follow-up (not yet converted).

Cheap commit-boundary structural sweep (ergonomics/attention-state/SKILL.md preflight) was discretionary: a new skill-package or scripts/*.py edit could defer it to the slow broad gate (#308/#325/#329). Root cause was latency/ordering not coverage (both gates predate #329 and were wired into both paths); the full run_slice_closeout reached them only after surface-match/cautilus. Converted: the full closeout now runs the structural sweep FIRST (block_on_structural_sweep), pinned by an e2e red-without-fix regression test. Detection point: structural-sweep phase in run_slice_closeout + the existing pre-commit hook.

Nth instance (#219->#251->#260->#320->#321->#335) of the changed-line mutation gate auto-filing post-merge. Root cause: the cheap consumer's silent skip (no/stale coverage while eligible pool files changed) reads identically to a clean pass, so uncovered changed lines reach main and only the scheduled cron flags them. Converted: check_changed_line_mutation_coverage.py now surfaces a loud non-blocking obligation (coverage_not_verified + stderr WARNING) on every unverified skip; detection point = the check-changed-line-mutation-coverage gate's attention-output at pre-push (run-quality.sh:296), fresh-eye-verified to reach the operator. Hard-gate/auto-produce deferred by design (no Goodhart). Also cleared #335's survivors + 85 v0.28.0 uncovered changed lines (Slice 2).
Release publish reported install_refresh in final JSON but did not persist it in the release artifact; Slice 9 now records install refresh before final artifact commit and asserts artifact content.

Tripwire response #358: upgraded the retro_lesson conversion to a gate. check_mutation_run_proof.py refuses citing a dispatch/no-base-sha run as changed-line proof; the coverage script's no-base-sha verdict is loud and machine-readable; the mutation workflow auto-close is schedule-only.
